The '''dalloralla tree''' was a thirty-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-tall [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Tree/Legends|tree]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]]. [[Scientist/Legends|Scientist]] [[Danni Quee]] often watched the planet's [[Star/Legends|sunset]] as it filtered through these trees.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2002-02-XX -->''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
